text.title: North Star Metric Design Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf references a rule id.

decision-tree.root-question: Do all preconditions in Applies-If hold AND no Skip-If trigger fires?

branch.question: Is the stake high (>=10k impact OR regulated surface OR >100 stakeholders affected)?

conclusion.verdict: apply with full discipline incl. named reviewer + evidence anchors
apply minimum-viable form with named owner and one citation per field

text.example: preconditions true, high_stake=true → apply with full discipline (rule human-checkpoint)
